The area also benefits from good connectivity to Uppal and other parts of Hyderabad through major road networks. According to project details, ASBL Springs is a gated high-rise community spread across about 4.11 acres with two towers and substantial open spaces, providing a balanced residential environment.With its strategic location, practical layout, and placement within a modern residential community, this apartment offers a suitable opportunity for families or professionals looking to own a home in the growing Pocharam region of Hyderabad.

resultList.dtldesc: ::spacious 3 BHK apartment is available for sale in the prestigious Lanco Hills township at Manikonda, Hyderabad. Spread across 1570 sq. ft, this ready to move apartment offers a premium high-rise lifestyle with excellent connectivity to Hyderabad’s major IT and commercial hubs. Situated on the 17th floor of a 21-floor tower, the apartment enjoys beautiful open views, ample natural light, and excellent ventilation. The East-facing orientation further enhances the comfort and positive ambience of the home, making it ideal for modern family living.::Property Specifications::This semi-furnished apartment features 3 well-designed bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, and 1 balcony with a functional layout that maximises living space and comfort. The apartment includes separate living and dining areas, creating a spacious and organised interior environment. The home is fitted with quality tiled flooring and comes with modular kitchen provisions including chimney and storage fittings. The property also includes 1 covered car parking space and is thoughtfully planned for comfortable everyday living with good cross ventilation throughout the apartment.::Facilities::Residents of Lanco Hills enjoy access to a wide range of premium lifestyle amenities including a clubhouse, swimming pool, gymnasium, jogging tracks, landscaped gardens, sports courts, indoor games, mini theatre, library, multipurpose halls, power backup, lifts, CCTV surveillance, and 24/7 security. The township is known for its organised infrastructure, wide internal roads, open green spaces, and strong maintenance standards. ::Locality::Located in Manikonda, Hyderabad, the property enjoys excellent connectivity to Gachibowli, Financial District, Hitech City, and Outer Ring Road, making it highly suitable for IT professionals and families. Schools, hospitals, supermarkets, restaurants, and entertainment zones are situated within 2 km of the project. The locality has emerged as one of Hyderabad’s most preferred residential destinations due to its proximity to major employment hubs and growing social infrastructure. Nearby residential communities include Jains Carlton Creek, Niharika Exotica, Vazhraa Vihhari Gated Community, and The Trails which contribute to the premium residential ecosystem of the area.::Residents and local discussions frequently highlight the township lifestyle, strong amenities, and connectivity advantages of Lanco Hills, although some discussions also mention peak-hour traffic and surrounding infrastructure challenges typical of rapidly growing urban corridors. ::
